data.content: Planning complete. Investigate with tests around two paths: live `plan step remove` must validate before writes, and rehydrate/init must not let sparse/stale `idx.knot_head.execution_plan` overwrite a fuller `knot.execution_plan_data_set` snapshot. Start with app/CLI repro for wave 5 step removal after edge edits, then add replay tests for full-vs-index execution_plan precedence.
